zh.lifeSummary: 當Samuel Ely Jr.於1668年5月9日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德時，他的父親Samuel Ely Sr.33歲，母親Mary Day26歲。他於1697年11月10日與Martha Bliss在美國西維吉尼亞州哈普爾斯普林菲爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1668年住在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普爾哈特菲爾德且於1732年住在美國西維吉尼亞州哈普爾斯普林菲爾德。他去世於1732年8月23日在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普登斯普林菲爾德享年64歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普登斯普林菲爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Samuel Ely Jr.于1668年5月9日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德时，他的父亲Samuel Ely Sr.33岁，母亲Mary Day26岁。他于1697年11月10日与Martha Bliss在美国西弗吉尼亚州哈普爾斯普林菲爾德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1668年住在美国马萨诸塞州哈普爾哈特菲爾德且于1732年住在美国西弗吉尼亚州哈普爾斯普林菲爾德。他去世于1732年8月23日在美国马萨诸塞州哈普登斯普林菲爾德享年64岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州哈普登斯普林菲爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Ely
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ely, a cathedral city on an island in the fens north of Cambridge, so named from Old English ǣl ‘eel’ + gē ‘district’.
English, French, and Breton (Finistère): from the Middle English, Old French personal name Elie, Hely (Elijah in the King James Bible); see Ellis and Elias .

variants.name: Ellis
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Elis, an Old French vernacular form of Elias, the Latin and New Testament Greek form of Hebrew Eliyahu; see Elijah and compare Elias , Lias , Ely .
English: possibly in some instances from the Middle English female personal name Elice, a pet form of Elizabeth .

Welsh: from Elis, a shortened form of the Welsh personal name Elisse (earlier Elisedd, a derivative of elus ‘kindly, benevolent’). As usual in Welsh, the stress in Elisse is on the penultimate syllable -li-, which shifts to initial El- when the name is shortened to Elis. It later became confused with Ellis in 1 above.

variants.name: Iley
meanings: English (Durham): habitational name from Brent Eleigh or Monks Eleigh in Suffolk, or perhaps from Illey in Worcestershire. The Suffolk placename derives from an Old English personal name Illa (genitive Illan) + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The Worcestershire placename derives from the Old English personal name Hilla or Illa + lēah. Alternatively, the name may be a variant of Ely .
Perhaps an Americanized form of German   Ihle  .

variants.name: Elley
meanings: English: variant of   Ely   or   Ella  .

variants.name: Eley
meanings: German: from a vernacular form of the medieval personal name Eligius (see Eligio ), a Christian saint's name.

nameMeanings.name: Samuel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (Hebrew Shemuel), possibly meaning ‘He (God) has hearkened’ (presumably to the prayers of a mother for a son). It may also be understood as a contracted form of Hebrew sha'ulme'el meaning ‘asked of God’. In the case of Samuel the son of Hannah, this would be more in keeping with his mother's statement ‘Because I have asked him of the Lord’ (1 Samuel 1:20). Living in the 11th century bc , Samuel was a Hebrew judge and prophet of the greatest historical importance, who established the Hebrew monarchy, anointing as king both Saul and, later, David. In the Authorized Version two books of the Old Testament are named after him, although in Roman Catholic and Orthodox versions of the Bible they are known as the first and second Book of Kings. The story of Samuel being called by God while still a child serving in the house of Eli the priest (1 Samuel 3) is of great vividness and has moved countless generations. In England and America the name was particularly popular among the 16th-century Puritans and among Nonconformists from the 17th to the 19th century. It became fashionable again in the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Samuel Ely Jr. was born on 9 May 1668, in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Samuel Ely Sr., was 33 and his mother, Mary Day, was 26. He married Martha Bliss on 10 November 1697, in Springfield, Hampshire, West Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He lived in Hatfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts, United States in 1668 and Springfield, Hampshire, West Virginia, United States in 1732. He died on 23 August 1732, in Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 64, and was buried in Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Samuel Ely Jr. est né le 9 mai 1668, à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Samuel Ely Sr., avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mary Day, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Martha Bliss le 10 novembre 1697, à Springfield, Hampshire, Virginie occidentale, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Hatfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1668 et à Springfield, Hampshire, Virginie occidentale, États-Unis en 1732. Il est décédé le 23 août 1732, à Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Samuel Ely Jr. am 9. Mai 1668 in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Samuel Ely Sr. 33 und seine Mutter Mary Day 26. Er hat am 10. November 1697 in Springfield, Hampshire, West Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten Martha Bliss geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1668 hat er in Hatfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und 1732 in Springfield, Hampshire, West Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 23. August 1732 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Ely Jr. è nato il il 9 maggio 1668 nel Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Samuel Ely Sr., aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Mary Day, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Martha Bliss il 10 novembre 1697, nel Springfield, Hampshire, Virginia Occidentale, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Hatfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1668 e nel Springfield, Hampshire, Virginia Occidentale, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1732. Morì il 23 agosto 1732, nel Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Samuel Ely Jr.が1668年5月9日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドで生まれた時，父Samuel Ely Sr.は33歳，母Mary Dayは26歳であった。1697年11月10日にアメリカ合衆国ウエストバージニア州ハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドでMartha Blissと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1668年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプシュアイアハトフィールドに，1732年にはアメリカ合衆国ウエストバージニア州ハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドに住んでいた。彼は1732年8月23日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプデンスプリングフィールドで64歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプデンスプリングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스프링필드
ko.Hatfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 하트필드
ko.lifeSummary: Samuel Ely Jr.(이)가 1668년 5월 9일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Samuel Ely Sr.(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Day(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1697년 11월 10일 미국 웨스트버지니아 주 함프실르 스프링필드에서 Martha Bliss(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1668년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 함프실르 하트필드에서, 1732년도에 미국 웨스트버지니아 주 함프실르 스프링필드에서 살았다. 그는 1732년 8월 23일 미국 매사추세츠 주 함p든 스프링필드에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 함p든 스프링필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Samuel Ely Jr. nasceu em 9 de maio de 1668, em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Samuel Ely Sr., tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mary Day, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Martha Bliss em 10 de novembro de 1697, em Springfield, Hampshire, Virgínia Ocidental, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Hatfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1668 e em Springfield, Hampshire, Virgínia Ocidental, Estados Unidos da América em 1732. Ele faleceu em 23 de agosto de 1732, em Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Samuel Ely Jr. родился 9 мая 1668 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Samuel Ely Sr. было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Day, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Martha Bliss 10 ноября 1697 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, Западная Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности хатфиелд, хампшир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1668 году и в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, Западная Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в 1732 году. Он умер 23 августа 1732 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампден, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности спрингфиелд, хампден, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Samuel Ely Jr. nació el 9 de mayo de 1668, en Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Samuel Ely Sr., tenía 33 años y su mamá, Mary Day, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Martha Bliss el 10 de noviembre de 1697, en Springfield, Hampshire, Virginia Occidental, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Vivió en Hatfield, Hampshire, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1668 y en Springfield, Hampshire, Virginia Occidental, Estados Unidos en 1732. Murió el 23 de agosto de 1732, en Springfield, Hampden, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Springfield, Hampden, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
